# kong-gateway_rbac_user_role (Resource)

RbacUserRole Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kong-gateway_rbac_user_role" "my_rbacuserrole" {
  role      = "...my_role..."
  user_id   = "...my_user_id..."
  workspace = "team-payments"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `role` (String) The RBAC role assigned to the user. Requires replacement if changed.
- `user_id` (String) The RBAC user ID associated with the role. Requires replacement if changed.
- `workspace` (String) The name of the workspace. Default: "default"; Requires replacement if changed.
